title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited family as a Investment Banker in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited:
Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda Advisory Limited!
